generated_oml:
instance Sensor : DTDFVocab:SensingComponent [
    base:desc "Generic sensor collecting data for Digital Twin"
    DTDFVocab:producedData SensorDataTransmitted
]

instance SensorDataTransmitted : DTDFVocab:DataTransmitted [
    DTDFVocab:producedFrom Sensor
]

instance SensorData : DTDFVocab:Data [
    base:desc "Sensor-collected data managed by calibration algorithms"
    DTDFVocab:fromData SensorDataTransmitted
    DTDFVocab:inputTo CalibrationAlgorithm
]

instance StructuralCADModel : DTDFVocab:Model [
    base:desc "Geometric model using CAD for structural dimensions"
    DTDFVocab:inputTo CalibrationAlgorithm, FaultDetectionAlgorithm, SupervisoryControlAlgorithm, StateEstimationAlgorithm, OptimizationAlgorithm, SimulationAlgorithm
]

instance DynamicBehaviorModel : DTDFVocab:Model [
    base:desc "Analytical model using differential equations for dynamic behavior"
    DTDFVocab:inputTo CalibrationAlgorithm, FaultDetectionAlgorithm, SupervisoryControlAlgorithm, StateEstimationAlgorithm, OptimizationAlgorithm, SimulationAlgorithm
]

instance CalibrationAlgorithm : DTDFVocab:Enabler [
    base:desc "Calibration algorithm for updating model parameters with sensor data"
    DTDFVocab:enables CalibrationService
]

instance FaultDetectionAlgorithm : DTDFVocab:Enabler [
    base:desc "Algorithm for detecting faults in system behavior"
    DTDFVocab:enables FaultDetectionService
]

instance SupervisoryControlAlgorithm : DTDFVocab:Enabler [
    base:desc "Algorithm for supervisory control of system operations"
    DTDFVocab:enables SupervisoryControlService
]

instance StateEstimationAlgorithm : DTDFVocab:Enabler [
    base:desc "Algorithm for estimating system state based on sensor data"
    DTDFVocab:enables StateEstimationService
]

instance OptimizationAlgorithm : DTDFVocab:Enabler [
    base:desc "Algorithm for optimizing system performance metrics"
    DTDFVocab:enables OptimizationService
]

instance SimulationAlgorithm : DTDFVocab:Enabler [
    base:desc "Algorithm for simulating system behavior using models"
    DTDFVocab:enables SimulationService
]

instance SimulationService : DTDFVocab:Service [
    base:desc "Simulation service to reproduce and predict Physical Twin behavior under current operating conditions"
    DTDFVocab:provides SimulationInsight
]

instance MonitoringService : DTDFVocab:Service [
    base:desc "Monitoring service to assess safety and optimal performance through real-time sensor data analysis"
    DTDFVocab:provides SafetyMonitoringInsight, OptimizationMetricInsight
]

instance CalibrationService : DTDFVocab:Service [
    base:desc "Service for updating model parameters via calibration algorithms"
    DTDFVocab:provides ParameterUpdateInsight
]

instance FaultDetectionService : DTDFVocab:Service [
    base:desc "Service for fault detection and anomaly identification"
    DTDFVocab:provides FaultDetectionInsight
]

instance SupervisoryControlService : DTDFVocab:Service [
    base:desc "Service for supervisory control of system operations"
    DTDFVocab:provides ControlAction
]

instance StateEstimationService : DTDFVocab:Service [
    base:desc "Service for estimating system state based on sensor data"
    DTDFVocab:provides StateEstimationInsight
]

instance OptimizationService : DTDFVocab:Service [
    base:desc "Service for optimizing system performance metrics"
    DTDFVocab:provides OptimizationInsight
]

instance SimulationInsight : DTDFVocab:Insight [
    base:desc "Predictive simulation results for system behavior"
]

instance SafetyMonitoringInsight : DTDFVocab:Insight [
    base:desc "Operational safety assessment from monitoring services"
]

instance OptimizationMetricInsight : DTDFVocab:Insight [
    base:desc "Optimization metrics for system performance"
]

instance ParameterUpdateInsight : DTDFVocab:Insight [
    base:desc "Updated model parameters from calibration process"
]

instance FaultDetectionInsight : DTDFVocab:Insight [
    base:desc "Anomaly detection and fault identification"
]

instance StateEstimationInsight : DTDFVocab:Insight [
    base:desc "Estimated current state of the system"
]

instance OptimizationInsight : DTDFVocab:Insight [
    base:desc "Optimized system configuration recommendations"
]

instance ControlAction : DTDFVocab:Action [
    base:desc "Automated corrective actions initiated by supervisory control service"
    DTDFVocab:IsAutomatic true
]

instance dt_constellation : DTDFVocab:Constellation [
    base:desc "The Digital Twin system orchestrates data flow from physical sensors through calibration algorithms to update CPS and environmental models, with results feeding into monitoring systems for safety and optimality checks; human or algorithmic interventions trigger physical adjustments upon violation detection."
]

instance fidelity_and_validity_considerations : DTDFVocab:FidelityConsideration [
    base:desc "Calibration algorithms update models with parameter estimates to maintain fidelity, while monitors validate system performance by checking safety and operational optimality; violations detected by monitors trigger corrective actions via human or algorithmic interventions."
]
